languages.text: "Эльдары... изживший свое предназначение инструмент, хозяева которого сгинули во тьме веков. Упорство, с которым эти существа цепляются за свое бессмысленное существование, не вызывает ничего, кроме жалости".
"Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."
languages.original_text: "Эльдары... изживший свое предназначение инструмент, хозяева которого сгинули во тьме веков. Упорство, с которым эти существа цепляются за свое бессмысленное существование, не вызывает ничего, кроме жалости".

traits.locale_text: "Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."
"Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."
"Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."

languages.text: «Los Aeldari... un instrumento obsoleto cuyos creadores cayeron ante la oscuridad de las eras. La tenacidad con la que estos seres se aferran a su insignificante existencia es francamente lamentable».
languages.original_text: "Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."

traits.locale_text: «Los Aeldari... un instrumento obsoleto cuyos creadores cayeron ante la oscuridad de las eras. La tenacidad con la que estos seres se aferran a su insignificante existencia es francamente lamentable».

languages.text: “艾达灵族……不过是一件早已过时的工具，它们的主人早已葬身于漫长岁月的黑暗之中。这些生物还死抓着它们那毫无意义的存在不放，这种执着真是可悲。”
languages.original_text: "Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."

traits.locale_text: “艾达灵族……不过是一件早已过时的工具，它们的主人早已葬身于漫长岁月的黑暗之中。这些生物还死抓着它们那毫无意义的存在不放，这种执着真是可悲。”

languages.text: « Les Aeldari... un instrument obsolète dont les maîtres ont péri depuis des éons. Il n'y a rien de plus pitoyable que des créatures qui s'accrochent à une existence dénuée de sens. »
languages.original_text: "Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."

traits.locale_text: « Les Aeldari... un instrument obsolète dont les maîtres ont péri depuis des éons. Il n'y a rien de plus pitoyable que des créatures qui s'accrochent à une existence dénuée de sens. »

languages.text: "Aeldariler... Efendileri çağların karanlığında yok olmuş köhne bir enstrüman. Bu yaratıkların anlamsız varoluşlarına tutunma azimleri, acınasızlıktan başka bir şey değil."
languages.original_text: "Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."

traits.locale_text: "Aeldariler... Efendileri çağların karanlığında yok olmuş köhne bir enstrüman. Bu yaratıkların anlamsız varoluşlarına tutunma azimleri, acınasızlıktan başka bir şey değil."

languages.text: "Aeldari ... ein obsoletes Instrument, dessen Meister in der Dunkelheit der Zeitalter vergingen. Die Beharrlichkeit, mit der sich diese Kreaturen an ihre bedeutungslose Existenz klammern, ist einfach nur erbärmlich."
languages.original_text: "Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."

traits.locale_text: "Aeldari ... ein obsoletes Instrument, dessen Meister in der Dunkelheit der Zeitalter vergingen. Die Beharrlichkeit, mit der sich diese Kreaturen an ihre bedeutungslose Existenz klammern, ist einfach nur erbärmlich."

languages.text: "アエルダリ...時代遅れの楽器...その主は時代の闇の中で滅びた。この生き物が無意味な存在にしがみつく執念は哀れとしか言いようがない"
languages.original_text: "Aeldari... an obsolete instrument whose masters perished in the darkness of the ages. The tenacity with which these creatures cling to their meaningless existence is nothing short of pitiful."
